Therapeutics

Direct disease associations, biomarker-linked drugs, OSMF narrative-review natural agents, merged ranking, and clinical trial / literature evidence (top agents)

From opensourcemed.info/chronic-disease — Potential dietary and lifestyle interventions for decreasing insulin resistance. Candidates for further study, not approved treatments.

DrugTypePhaseEvidence ScoreTrials & literatureSourcesLinks
METOPROLOL Small molecule Approved Strong 105
8 trials 1 Cochrane 27 Trial pubs 23 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT01500590 — Effect of Renin-angiotensin System Blockers on Glomerular Filtration Rate in Patients With Hypertension, Type 2 Diabetes With Normoalbuminuria (UNKNOWN) PHASE4
  • NCT00123604 — Vascular Effects of Carvedilol Versus Metoprolol in Hypertensive Patients With Type 2 Diabetes (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT00744237 — Study of the Glycemic Effects of Nebivolol Compared With Metoprolol and HCTZ in Diabetic Hypertensive Patients (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT00497003 — Effect of Beta Blocker Treatment on Endothelial Function in Patients With Type 2 Diabetes or Chronic Heart Failure (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT02246712 — Influence of Diabetes on Tramadol Pharmacokinetics (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT00642434 — Comparison of Blood Pressure Medications on Metabolism (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT00000620 — Action to Control Cardiovascular Risk in Diabetes (ACCORD) (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT04504045 — Metformin's Effect on Drug Metabolism in Patients With Type 2 Diabetes (TERMINATED) PHASE1

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Position of Beta-blockers in the Treatment of Hypertension Today: An Indian Consensus (The Journal of the Association of Physicians of India, 2024)
  • Clinical trial publication The effects of anti-hypertensives and type 2 diabetes on salivary flow and total antioxidant capacity (Oral diseases, 2015)
  • Clinical trial publication Effects of nebivolol on aortic compliance in patients with diabetes and maximal renin angiotensin system blockade: the EFFORT study (Journal of clinical hypertension (Greenwich, Conn.), 2013)
  • Clinical trial publication Metoprolol compared to carvedilol deteriorates insulin-stimulated endothelial function in patients with type 2 diabetes - a randomized study (Cardiovascular diabetology, 2010)
  • Clinical trial publication [Efficacy and tolerability of metoprolol retard in the treatment of patients with arterial hypertension and ischemic heart disease combined with type 2 diabetes mellitus] (Kardiologiia, 2009)
  • Clinical trial publication Demographic analyses of the effects of carvedilol vs metoprolol on glycemic control and insulin sensitivity in patients with type 2 diabetes and hypertension in the Glycemic Effects in Diabetes Mellitus: Carvedilol-Metoprolol Comparison in Hypertensives (GEMINI) study (Journal of the cardiometabolic syndrome, 2008)
  • Randomized controlled trial Comparison of carvedilol and metoprolol on serum lipid concentration in diabetic hypertensive patients (Diabetes, obesity & metabolism, 2009)

CT.gov search · Cochrane · PubMed

 Open Targets, ChEMBL ChEMBL Open Targets
ACARBOSE Small molecule Approved Strong 100
8 trials 22 Cochrane 26 Meta-analysis 252 Trial pubs 202 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT00970528 — Glucose Reduction by Early Acarbose Treatment in Basal Insulin (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT01316861 — Efficacy and Safety of Oral Acarbose Treatment in Patients With Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT03349684 — Loose-dose Combination of Acarbose and Metformin for T2DM in Metformin-failure Patients (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT01167231 — Prevention of Postprandial Hyperglycemia by Acarbose May be a Promising Therapeutic Strategy for Reducing the Increased Risk for Cardiovascular Disease (COMPLETED)
  • NCT05035849 — Comparison of the FGM Profiles in Patients of Type 2 Diabetes Treated With Sitagliptin and Acarbose (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT01697592 — Omarigliptin (MK-3102) Clinical Trial - Add-on to Oral Antihyperglycemic Agent Study in Japanese Participants With Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus (MK-3102-015) (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT03794336 — Efficacy and Safety of Alogliptin vs. Acarbose in Chinese Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus (T2DM) Patients With High CV Risk or CHD Treated With Aspirin and Inadequately Controlled With Metformin Monotherapy or Drug Naive (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT01388153 — A 3-fold Crossover Bioequivalence Study Between Glucobay Orally Disintegrating Tablet (ODT) and Glucobay Standard Tablet (COMPLETED) PHASE1

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Effects of different hypoglycaemic drugs on beta-cell function in type 2 diabetes mellitus: a systematic review and network meta-analysis (European journal of medical research, 2025)
  • Cochrane review Evaluation of glucose-lowering medications in older people: a comprehensive systematic review and network meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials (Age and ageing, 2024)
  • Cochrane review Long-term effects of different hypoglycemic drugs on carotid intima-media thickness progression: a systematic review and network meta-analysis (Frontiers in endocrinology, 2024)
  • Cochrane review Associations of antidiabetic drugs with diabetic retinopathy in people with type 2 diabetes: an umbrella review and meta-analysis (Frontiers in endocrinology, 2023)
  • Cochrane review All-cause mortality and cardiovascular events in patients with type 2 diabetes treated with alpha-glucosidase inhibitors: A meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials (Nutrition, metabolism, and cardiovascular diseases : NMCD, 2022)
  • Meta-analysis Probiotics, synbiotics and berberine in Type 2 diabetes mellitus: A systematic review, meta-analysis, and molecular dynamics simulation study (PloS one, 2026)
  • Meta-analysis α-Glucosidase-targeting 1,2,4-triazole antidiabetic candidates: comparative analysis and future perspectives (Future medicinal chemistry, 2025)
  • Meta-analysis Emodin, a rising star in the treatment of glycolipid metabolism disorders: a preclinical systematic review and meta-analysis (PeerJ, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Dapagliflozin restores odour-induced functional integration of primary olfactory cortex circuit but not olfactory-related regional brain activation in patients with type 2 diabetes: A 16-week randomised comparative study (Diabetes, obesity & metabolism, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Effect of acarbose and vildagliptin on plasma trimethylamine N-oxide levels in patients with type 2 diabetes mellitus: a 6-month, two-arm randomized controlled trial (Frontiers in endocrinology, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Baseline glucagon impacts glucose-lowering effects of acarbose but not metformin: A sub-analysis of MARCH study (Diabetes research and clinical practice, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Comparison of glucose fluctuation between metformin combined with acarbose or sitagliptin in Chinese patients with type 2 diabetes: A multicenter, randomized, active-controlled, open-label, parallel design clinical trial (Chinese medical journal, 2025)

ALBIGLUTIDE Biologic Approved Strong 100
8 trials 13 Cochrane 35 Meta-analysis 27 Trial pubs 26 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT02846233 — Stepping-down Approach in Patients With Chronic Poorly-controlled Diabetes on Advanced Insulin Therapy? (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT01357889 — Pharmacokinetics/Pharmacodynamics of Albiglutide (COMPLETED) PHASE2
  • NCT01475734 — Albiglutide Glucose Clamp Study in Subjects With Type 2 Diabetes (COMPLETED) PHASE2
  • NCT00838903 — Efficacy and Safety of Albiglutide in Treatment of Type 2 Diabetes (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT01406262 — Albiglutide Thorough ECG Study in Healthy Volunteers (COMPLETED) PHASE1
  • NCT02496221 — A Study Evaluating the Effect of Albiglutide on Gallbladder Emptying in Healthy Subjects (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT00839527 — A Study to Determine the Safety and Efficacy of Albiglutide in Subjects With Type 2 Diabetes (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT02465515 — Effect of Albiglutide, When Added to Standard Blood Glucose Lowering Therapies, on Major Cardiovascular Events in Subjects With Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus (COMPLETED) PHASE4

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Association Between GLP-1 Receptor Agonists and the Risk of Colon Cancer in Adults With Type 2 Diabetes or Obesity: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis (Diabetes/metabolism research and reviews, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Effects of new hypoglycemic drugs on patients with heart failure: a systematic review and network meta-analysis (Postgraduate medical journal, 2025)
  • Cochrane review Comparison of the efficacy and safety of 10 glucagon-like peptide-1 receptor agonists as add-on to metformin in patients with type 2 diabetes: a systematic review (Frontiers in endocrinology, 2023)
  • Cochrane review Effects of GLP-1 receptor agonists on neurological complications of diabetes (Reviews in endocrine & metabolic disorders, 2023)
  • Cochrane review Effects of Anti-Diabetic Drugs on Fracture Risk: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis (Frontiers in endocrinology, 2021)
  • Meta-analysis Cardiovascular Effects and Tolerability of GLP-1 Receptor Agonists: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis of 99,599 Patients (Journal of the American College of Cardiology, 2025)
  • Meta-analysis Comparative efficacy and tolerability of currently approved incretin mimetics: A systematic analysis of placebo-controlled clinical trials (Diabetes, obesity & metabolism, 2025)
  • Meta-analysis Efficacy and safety of albiglutide, a once-weekly glucagon-like peptide-1 receptor agonist, in patients with type 2 diabetes: A systematic review and meta-analysis (Medicine, 2024)
  • Systematic review Efficacy and safety of glucagon-like peptide 1 receptor agonists across all health outcomes in type 2 diabetes: An umbrella review and evidence map of randomised controlled trials (Diabetes, obesity & metabolism, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Albiglutide and atrial fibrillation in patients with Type 2 diabetes and established cardiovascular disease: insights from the Harmony Outcomes trial (European journal of preventive cardiology, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Effect of albiglutide on cardiovascular outcomes in older adults: A post hoc analysis of a randomized controlled trial (Diabetes, obesity & metabolism, 2024)
  • Clinical trial publication Effects of albiglutide on myocardial infarction and ischaemic heart disease outcomes in patients with type 2 diabetes and cardiovascular disease in the Harmony Outcomes trial (European heart journal. Cardiovascular pharmacotherapy, 2024)

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Efficacy and safety of novel antidiabetic drugs in patients with type 2 diabetes and chronic kidney disease: a network meta-analysis (Frontiers in endocrinology, 2026)

  • Cochrane review Glucagon-like peptide-1 receptor agonists for prevention of heart failure events in type 2 diabetes and/or obesity (ESC heart failure, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Economic evaluation of sodium-glucose transporter 2 inhibitors compared with glucagon-like peptide 1 receptor agonist for the treatment of type 2 diabetes: a systematic review (European journal of clinical pharmacology, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Relative Efficacy of Next-Generation Incretin Therapies for Cardio-Renal Protection in Type 2 Diabetes: Evidence From a Network Meta-Analysis (Diabetes, obesity & metabolism, 2026)
  • Meta-analysis Semaglutide-associated risk of nonarteritic anterior ischemic optic neuropathy in patients with type 2 diabetes: A systematic review and meta-analysis of observational studies (PLoS medicine, 2026)
  • Meta-analysis Glucagon-like peptide-1 receptor agonists and hair loss: A systematic review and meta-analysis (Diabetes research and clinical practice, 2026)
  • Meta-analysis Cardiometabolic Profiles of Oral and Subcutaneous Glucagon-Like Peptide-1 Receptor Mono-Agonists in Adults With Overweight or Obesity: A Systematic Review and Network Meta-Analysis (Diabetes, obesity & metabolism, 2026)
  • Systematic review Approved weight loss drugs for obesity with a thorough emphasis on GLP-1 agonist medications: A systematic review (Disease-a-month : DM, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Elecoglipron, an oral small molecule GLP-1 receptor agonist in adults with type 2 diabetes (SOLSTICE): a multicentre, phase 2b, randomised, placebo-controlled trial (Lancet (London, England), 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Cagrilintide-semaglutide (CagriSema) as an add-on to basal insulin in adults with type 2 diabetes (REIMAGINE 3): a randomised, double-blind, placebo-controlled, multicentre, phase 3 study (Lancet (London, England), 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Kidney and Survival Benefits of Semaglutide in Diabetes With Chronic Kidney Disease: FLOW Trial Cardiovascular Subgroup Analyses (Journal of the American College of Cardiology, 2026)

ACARBOSE Small molecule Approved Strong 100
8 trials 22 Cochrane 26 Meta-analysis 252 Trial pubs 202 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT00970528 — Glucose Reduction by Early Acarbose Treatment in Basal Insulin (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT01316861 — Efficacy and Safety of Oral Acarbose Treatment in Patients With Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT03349684 — Loose-dose Combination of Acarbose and Metformin for T2DM in Metformin-failure Patients (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT01167231 — Prevention of Postprandial Hyperglycemia by Acarbose May be a Promising Therapeutic Strategy for Reducing the Increased Risk for Cardiovascular Disease (COMPLETED)
  • NCT05035849 — Comparison of the FGM Profiles in Patients of Type 2 Diabetes Treated With Sitagliptin and Acarbose (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT01697592 — Omarigliptin (MK-3102) Clinical Trial - Add-on to Oral Antihyperglycemic Agent Study in Japanese Participants With Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus (MK-3102-015) (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT03794336 — Efficacy and Safety of Alogliptin vs. Acarbose in Chinese Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus (T2DM) Patients With High CV Risk or CHD Treated With Aspirin and Inadequately Controlled With Metformin Monotherapy or Drug Naive (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT01388153 — A 3-fold Crossover Bioequivalence Study Between Glucobay Orally Disintegrating Tablet (ODT) and Glucobay Standard Tablet (COMPLETED) PHASE1

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Effects of different hypoglycaemic drugs on beta-cell function in type 2 diabetes mellitus: a systematic review and network meta-analysis (European journal of medical research, 2025)
  • Cochrane review Evaluation of glucose-lowering medications in older people: a comprehensive systematic review and network meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials (Age and ageing, 2024)
  • Cochrane review Long-term effects of different hypoglycemic drugs on carotid intima-media thickness progression: a systematic review and network meta-analysis (Frontiers in endocrinology, 2024)
  • Cochrane review Associations of antidiabetic drugs with diabetic retinopathy in people with type 2 diabetes: an umbrella review and meta-analysis (Frontiers in endocrinology, 2023)
  • Cochrane review All-cause mortality and cardiovascular events in patients with type 2 diabetes treated with alpha-glucosidase inhibitors: A meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials (Nutrition, metabolism, and cardiovascular diseases : NMCD, 2022)
  • Meta-analysis Probiotics, synbiotics and berberine in Type 2 diabetes mellitus: A systematic review, meta-analysis, and molecular dynamics simulation study (PloS one, 2026)
  • Meta-analysis α-Glucosidase-targeting 1,2,4-triazole antidiabetic candidates: comparative analysis and future perspectives (Future medicinal chemistry, 2025)
  • Meta-analysis Emodin, a rising star in the treatment of glycolipid metabolism disorders: a preclinical systematic review and meta-analysis (PeerJ, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Dapagliflozin restores odour-induced functional integration of primary olfactory cortex circuit but not olfactory-related regional brain activation in patients with type 2 diabetes: A 16-week randomised comparative study (Diabetes, obesity & metabolism, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Effect of acarbose and vildagliptin on plasma trimethylamine N-oxide levels in patients with type 2 diabetes mellitus: a 6-month, two-arm randomized controlled trial (Frontiers in endocrinology, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Baseline glucagon impacts glucose-lowering effects of acarbose but not metformin: A sub-analysis of MARCH study (Diabetes research and clinical practice, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Comparison of glucose fluctuation between metformin combined with acarbose or sitagliptin in Chinese patients with type 2 diabetes: A multicenter, randomized, active-controlled, open-label, parallel design clinical trial (Chinese medical journal, 2025)

8 trials 1 Cochrane 27 Trial pubs 23 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT01500590 — Effect of Renin-angiotensin System Blockers on Glomerular Filtration Rate in Patients With Hypertension, Type 2 Diabetes With Normoalbuminuria (UNKNOWN) PHASE4
  • NCT00123604 — Vascular Effects of Carvedilol Versus Metoprolol in Hypertensive Patients With Type 2 Diabetes (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT00744237 — Study of the Glycemic Effects of Nebivolol Compared With Metoprolol and HCTZ in Diabetic Hypertensive Patients (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT00497003 — Effect of Beta Blocker Treatment on Endothelial Function in Patients With Type 2 Diabetes or Chronic Heart Failure (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT02246712 — Influence of Diabetes on Tramadol Pharmacokinetics (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT00642434 — Comparison of Blood Pressure Medications on Metabolism (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT00000620 — Action to Control Cardiovascular Risk in Diabetes (ACCORD) (COMPLETED) PHASE3
  • NCT04504045 — Metformin's Effect on Drug Metabolism in Patients With Type 2 Diabetes (TERMINATED) PHASE1

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Position of Beta-blockers in the Treatment of Hypertension Today: An Indian Consensus (The Journal of the Association of Physicians of India, 2024)
  • Clinical trial publication The effects of anti-hypertensives and type 2 diabetes on salivary flow and total antioxidant capacity (Oral diseases, 2015)
  • Clinical trial publication Effects of nebivolol on aortic compliance in patients with diabetes and maximal renin angiotensin system blockade: the EFFORT study (Journal of clinical hypertension (Greenwich, Conn.), 2013)
  • Clinical trial publication Metoprolol compared to carvedilol deteriorates insulin-stimulated endothelial function in patients with type 2 diabetes - a randomized study (Cardiovascular diabetology, 2010)
  • Clinical trial publication [Efficacy and tolerability of metoprolol retard in the treatment of patients with arterial hypertension and ischemic heart disease combined with type 2 diabetes mellitus] (Kardiologiia, 2009)
  • Clinical trial publication Demographic analyses of the effects of carvedilol vs metoprolol on glycemic control and insulin sensitivity in patients with type 2 diabetes and hypertension in the Glycemic Effects in Diabetes Mellitus: Carvedilol-Metoprolol Comparison in Hypertensives (GEMINI) study (Journal of the cardiometabolic syndrome, 2008)
  • Randomized controlled trial Comparison of carvedilol and metoprolol on serum lipid concentration in diabetic hypertensive patients (Diabetes, obesity & metabolism, 2009)

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Gegen Qinlian decoction ameliorates insulin resistance in type 2 diabetes: A systematic review and meta-analysis of RCTs with mechanistic insights into SIRT1/AMPK pathway activation (Journal of ethnopharmacology, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Clinical Efficacy of Curcumin, Resveratrol, Silymarin, and Berberine on Cardio-Metabolic Risk Factors Among Patients With Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus: A Systemic Review and Bayesian Network Meta-Analysis (Phytotherapy research : PTR, 2025)
  • Cochrane review Berberine and health outcomes: an overview of systematic reviews (BMC complementary medicine and therapies, 2025)
  • Cochrane review The Effect of Berberine on Metabolic Profiles in Type 2 Diabetic Patients: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials (Oxidative medicine and cellular longevity, 2021)
  • Cochrane review Efficacy and safety of berberine in the treatment of type 2 diabetes with insulin resistance: Protocol for a systematic review (Medicine, 2019)
  • Meta-analysis Probiotics, synbiotics and berberine in Type 2 diabetes mellitus: A systematic review, meta-analysis, and molecular dynamics simulation study (PloS one, 2026)
  • Meta-analysis Effects of berberine on blood glucose in patients with type 2 diabetes mellitus: a systematic literature review and a meta-analysis (Endocrine journal, 2019)
  • Systematic review The Effect of Berberine Supplementation on Glycemic Control and Inflammatory Biomarkers in Metabolic Disorders: An Umbrella Meta-analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials (Clinical therapeutics, 2024)
  • Clinical trial publication Berberine Ursodeoxycholate for the Treatment of Type 2 Diabetes: A Randomized Clinical Trial (JAMA network open, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication The efficacy and safety of berberine in combination with cinnamon supplementation in patients with type 2 diabetes: a randomized clinical trial (European journal of nutrition, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication The Pharmacokinetic Interaction Between Metformin and the Natural Product Goldenseal Is Metformin Dose-Dependent: A Three-Arm Crossover Study in Adults With Type 2 Diabetes (Clinical and translational science, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Efficacy and safety of HIMABERB® Berberine on glycemic control in patients with prediabetes: double-blind, placebo-controlled, and randomized pilot trial (BMC endocrine disorders, 2023)
